_comment_intro: Skill: qa-visual-regression · Template: chromatic-config. Place at repo root as chromatic.config.json.
_comment_turbosnap: TurboSnap re-snapshots only stories whose dependency graph changed. Mandatory for libraries above ~50 stories.
_comment_autoaccept: Auto-accept new baselines on main after merge. Without this, every merge blocks the next PR.
_comment_exit: Fail the CI step on diffs. Set true if you want UI Review (web) to be the only gate.
_comment_skip: Storybook config files / fixtures that should not trigger TurboSnap rebuilds.
_comment_externals: Treat these paths as external — changes do NOT trigger story rebuilds.
